results.title: Musk's SpaceX targets US consumers with Starlink mobile service push, FT reports - Yahoo Finance
results.description: Musk's SpaceX targets US consumers with Starlink mobile service push, FT reports Yahoo Finance SpaceX threat will remain an overhang on wireless stocks, says TD Cowen TipRanks SpaceX (SPCX.US) seeks to build an integrated connectivity platform: analysts say T-Mobile (TMUS.US) has become its top acquisition target. Moomoo SpaceX May Be Eyeing US Mobile Market – Even As Musk Says ‘Star’ Branding Has Gone Too Far Stocktwits Could SpaceX Buy T-Mobile? A TD Cowen Analyst Floats the Idea 24/7 Wall St.

results.title: Bankers told to ensure timely approval of loans under welfare schemes
results.description: Ranga Reddy DCC meeting discusses simplifying loan-sanctioning process, removing bottlenecks in credit disbursement and expediting assistance to eligible beneficiaries
